diff:
diff --git a/src/network.py b/src/network.py
index 7540f16..e0c15cf 100644
--- a/src/network.py
+++ b/src/network.py
@@ -1,7 +1,31 @@
 def parse_host_port(value: str, default_port: int = 80) -> tuple[str, int]:
-    host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
-    if not sep:
-        return value, default_port
-    if port_text == "":
-        return host, default_port
-    return host, int(port_text)
+    if value.startswith("["):
+        try:
+            close_idx = value.index("]")
+        except ValueError:
+            # malformed, fallback to original split
+            host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
+            if not sep:
+                return value, default_port
+            if port_text == "":
+                return host, default_port
+            return host, int(port_text)
+        host = value[1:close_idx]
+        remaining = value[close_idx+1:]
+        if remaining.startswith(":"):
+            port_text = remaining[1:]
+            if port_text == "":
+                return host, default_port
+            try:
+                return host, int(port_text)
+            except ValueError:
+                return host, default_port
+        else:
+            return host, default_port
+    else:
+        host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
+        if not sep:
+            return value, default_port
+        if port_text == "":
+            return host, default_port
+        return host, int(port_text)
